title: Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
